posts.text: Don’t just listen...be part of it. Call Cuomo Mornings on @SIRIUSXM now at 866-967-6887

Little man makes egregious claims for profit...why does this one bother him? Messes with his money.


Tim Pool (@Timcast)

MSNOW Must issue a retraction and apology NOW

This is an outrageous lie

@SecWar is a gentleman and a scholar and I have never called him a "war criminal"

I have reservations about US involvement in Iran but have never made such egregious claims about Pete Hegseth

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Timcast/status/2034022727099560160#m

See the game:


Power to the People ☭🕊 (@ProudSocialist)

BREAKING: Trump economic adviser Kevin Hassett just said the quiet part out loud.

“If the war were to be extended it wouldn't really disrupt the US economy at all. It would hurt consumers…but that's really the last of our concerns right now."

They don’t care about us at all.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ProudSocialist/status/2033904391963447558#m

The state of play:


Frank McCormick (@CBHeresy)

Dear Megyn,

@megynkelly 

Thanks for the follow.  

Sorry for repeatedly calling you a ‘retard.’

Warmest Regards, retard.

Frank.





— https://nitter.net/CBHeresy/status/2034109183847526810#m

Maga why is this ok?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Just a reminder that President Trump’s memecoin surged more than 50% in 24 hours after it was announced that the top 297 holders would be invited to an exclusive Mar-a-Lago gala. 

Sounds pretty corrupt to us.
wsj.com/livecoverage/stock-m…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2033981746719453659#m

This is well said and resonant but is this just asking to reject or is there something better to attach to?


Mila Joy (@Milajoy)

I’m DONE.

40 FUCKING YEARS of sweat.  
Two degrees.  
Busted my ass.  
Raised good kids.  
Paid every damn tax.  
Obeyed every law.  
Voted like they told me to.  

And for what?

A system that laughs in our face.  
Politicians who lie straight to our cameras.  
Promises of “better days” that were just bait.  
While THEY cash checks and WE get the bill.

We built th

What you empower...you own


Piers Morgan (@piersmorgan)

🤣🤣The biggest problem with this is I’m not right-wing…



— https://nitter.net/piersmorgan/status/2033624794214605054#m

No love most here but that is a winning proposition?


Tim Miller (@Timodc)

These people will have only themselves to blame when President AOC starts garnishing their assets.



— https://nitter.net/Timodc/status/2033689594026160328#m

If he really believes what he is saying isn't that more troubling?


Roger Stone (@RogerJStoneJr)

You may disagree  with Tucker Carlson, you may loathe him but  if you think that his views are not heartfelt and that he is not a loyal American you are wrong .



— https://nitter.net/RogerJStoneJr/status/2033688692754165815#m
See what is happening in beirut?  Will America be drawn in? piped.video/zYe3V0C_j-Y

He got the clicks. The algorithm does not reward proof, merely provocation


Gad Saad (@GadSaad)

It is truly baffling that someone could write such a post and with such full confidence.  Perhaps Wikipedia Dave did not do a sufficiently thorough search:  

piped.video/watch?v=9fAKmzPh…




— https://nitter.net/GadSaad/status/2033538934139957309#m

Start with returning the tarriffs...that matters to the many. Be for them. For once.


Elizabeth Warren (@ewarren)

ABC, Meta, X, and Paramount promised as much as $63 million in donations to Trump's future Presidential Library.

But now the Library Fund is dissolved, leaving the American people in the dark on the fate of millions of dollars.

Where did that money go? I’m pushing for answers.



— https://nitter.net/ewarren/status/2033642754530476079#m

Maga - how is this swampiness ok?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

The Trump sons are investing hundreds of millions in drone companies targeting government contracts. 

It doesn't take an ethics expert to see how this could be a huge conflict of interest.
bloomberg.com/news/articles/…




— https://nitter.net/CREWcrew/status/2033528814580490289#m

Guess again


Brian Krassenstein (@krassenstein)

We have left the United States for Montreal. No corruption here.





— https://nitter.net/krassenstein/status/2033602627481616417#m

See the game. Amazing how people do not get that we are rewarding all of the rage bait


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Megyn Kelly to Mark Levin:

"It's truly an honor to be with you. Whenever I see you I stop, whenever Mark Levin has a book I read. There is such a small collection of people who are truly brilliant and honest. You're honest to a fault.”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2033680877469786289#m

Join the conversation on Cuomo Mornings.
Call @SIRIUSXM now at 866-967-6887

Which pod bros do that in this thunderdome hellscape?


"Doc" Hypnosis 🧠 | BowTied Brain-Hacking (@BowTiedTrance)

I gave you the formula for knowing which podcaster to listen to.

It's whichever one makes you feel energized and not demoralized when you're done listening to them.

Usually that means they're giving you a clear strategy for action. Go be useful.



— https://nitter.net/BowTiedTrance/status/2033732685454000569#m
